sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Fighting Game Combat
special_mechanics.description: Genesis version is a one-on-one competitive fighting game with two-segment matches: player fights regular-sized monster as Ranger, then battles giant version

special_mechanics.name: Character Roster
special_mechanics.description: Five original Rangers playable initially, plus Megazord. Green Ranger and Dragonzord unlock after defeating them in Scenario Mode

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Genesis version is a fighting game with minimal documented movement physics. Available sources are encyclopedic in nature and focus on gameplay modes and content rather than technical physics parameters. No specific movement values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel precision data found in documentation.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Mighty Morphin Power Rangers (video game)
